title: Weekly Team Meeting
goal: Improve workplace communication confidence during meetings.

context.situation: The learner joins a weekly project status meeting and must explain progress, blockers, and next steps.

conversation_stages.title: Greeting
conversation_stages.ai_prompt: Welcome the learner to the meeting and ask how the project is going.

conversation_stages.title: Project Update
conversation_stages.ai_prompt: Ask the learner to explain completed tasks this week.

conversation_stages.title: Problem Discussion
conversation_stages.ai_prompt: Ask if there are any blockers or technical issues.

conversation_stages.title: Next Steps
conversation_stages.ai_prompt: Ask the learner about next week's plan.

conversation_stages.title: Closing
conversation_stages.ai_prompt: End the meeting professionally and provide encouragement.

difficulty_adjustment_rules.if_score_above_80: Increase complexity and introduce faster-paced discussions.
difficulty_adjustment_rules.if_score_below_50: Use shorter questions and simpler vocabulary.
